title: Repo-wide integrity gate on the container
description:
Attach a whole-repository validation gate to breakable containers so it must pass before a container completes.

## Background

No repo-wide completion check is installed today; whole-repo validation is the reusable `run_rules(None)` entry (main.rs:4771). With anchors able to carry gate presets, a config-declared `repo-validate` preset can be declared on the `plan` template's `container` anchor. By INV-GATE-SEMANTICS an issue cannot reach Done with pending or failed gates, so the gate blocks the container's transition to done until whole-repo validation passes.

## Success Criteria

- [hard] REQ-13: a config-declared repo-validate gate whose checker runs whole-repository validation is declared on the plan template's container anchor and blocks the bound container from reaching Done until it passes, introducing no domain literal into engine code.

## Notes

Declare a `repo-validate` gate preset (checker = whole-repo validation, `run_rules(None)`, main.rs:4771) and attach it to the `container` anchor of the `plan` template in .jit/templates.toml. The container's required-gate state rides the existing `Issue.gates_status` (types.rs:395). Introduce no domain literal into engine code; document the gate.
